title: Links to Curling Associations & Information
content:
# Links to Curling Associations & Information

**USA Curling (USCA)** 
Otherwise known as the United States Curling Association or USCA, this organization is the National Governing Body of the Olympic sport of curling and the Paralympic sport of wheelchair curling in the United States.  
<https://www.usacurling.org/>

**Grand National Curling Club (GNCC)** 
Regional association for the largest geographic region in the US, with clubs throughout the eastern States, from Maine to Florida, including Triangle Curling Club.  
<https://www.gncc.org/> 

**US Women's Curling Association (USWCA)** 
Organization with a mission to develop, nurture and promote the sport of curling among today's women and all youth.  
<https://www.uswca.org/>

**World Curling Federation** 
The world governing body of the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Sport of Curling  
<http://www.worldcurling.org/>

**Curling Canada** 
Association that governs curling in Canada.  
<https://www.curling.ca/>

**CurlingZone** 
Curling news, live scores, team rosters & information, blogs, and more  
<http://www.curlingzone.com/>

---
